## Summary

- What changed.
- Keep this to a short, concrete list.

## Why

- What problem, gap, regression, or contract change this PR addresses.
- Explain the reason for the change, not just the mechanism.

## Contracts

- List the exact contract surfaces affected.
- Examples: `manifest.json`, stage artifacts, backend codegen indices, solver inputs, CI/workflows, docs.

## Tests

- List the exact commands you ran.
- Include only fresh verification for this PR.

## CI

- State the current PR check status.
- Call out any informational or non-required jobs separately.

## Scope

- State explicit non-goals, deferred follow-ups, or intentionally excluded work.

## Reviewer Notes

- Anything unusual reviewers should pay attention to.
- Keep this empty if there is nothing special to call out.
